description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.6 Docker image. Set a before_script that runs python -V, define a PIP_CACHE_DIR variable pointing to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/pip-cache, and configure a cache with key $CI_PROJECT_ID storing the pip-cache directory. Add a test job (default stage) that executes pip install -U pip setuptools, then pip install -e .[test], and finally runs tox. The pipeline should use the cache for the pip packages.
